# Exegesis

> Specialised AI agent stacks built for Australian compliance reality. Four pillars (DRMO, Legal, Digital Legacy Vault, Cyber by Exegesis) under one company, every claim grounded in primary Australian regulator sources.

Exegesis builds narrow, regulated-domain AI services for Australian businesses, lawyers, families, and individuals. Each pillar focuses on one buyer cohort with one well-defined problem — no horizontal platforms, no "AI for everything".

DRMO is live with Stripe checkout. Legal, Digital Legacy Vault, and Cyber by Exegesis are opening waitlists.

Source-policy: every claim on every door page traces to a primary public Australian source — ACSC, OAIC, ASIC, Federal Court, ART, ACCC Scamwatch, eSafety Commissioner — cited inline.

Operator: Andre Fabre, Perth WA. ABN 81 554 376 814. Background: 10+ years GRC delivery (Rio Tinto, WA Department of Finance, government agencies). Currently studying Bachelor of IT (Cyber Security) at Murdoch University.

## DRMO — Digital Risk Management Officer

> Plain-English Australian cybersecurity compliance services for SMBs. Live Stripe checkout — email security checks, identity verification templates, pre-settlement audits.

- [Pillar landing](https://exegete.com.au/drmo/): overview, service shapes, and how to engage.
- [All DRMO doors](https://exegete.com.au/drmo/services/): the full door directory (155 doors).

### Boutique Firm (5 doors)

- [Email Authentication Check for Perth Boutique Firms: Close the SPF/DMARC/DKIM Gap That Lets BEC Impersonate Your Domain](https://exegete.com.au/drmo/boutique-firms/perth/privacy-act-bec/): Your firm has under ten staff. You don't have an in-house IT team, your mail runs on Microsoft 365 or Google Workspace, and your domain was set up years ago by whoever built the website. If an attacker can send email that looks like it came
- [Identity Verification Protocol Template for Perth Boutique Firms: A Privacy Act-Aligned Client ID Workflow](https://exegete.com.au/drmo/boutique-firms/perth/privacy-act-client-identity-theft/): You run a firm of under ten staff. You take on new clients most weeks, and each one hands you a driver's licence, a passport scan, or a Medicare card by email. Nobody on your team has time to design a verification workflow from scratch, but
- [Pre-Settlement Flash Audit for Perth Boutique Firms: Detect Deepfake-Voice Wire Instructions Before Funds Move](https://exegete.com.au/drmo/boutique-firms/perth/privacy-act-deepfake-voice-instructions/): A partner at your firm gets a voicemail. It sounds exactly like the client — same cadence, same Perth accent, same way they always say "mate" at the end. The message asks you to update the trust account details for tomorrow's settlement and
- [Pre-Settlement Flash Audit for Perth Boutique Firms: Detect Settlement Hijack Indicators Before Funds Move](https://exegete.com.au/drmo/boutique-firms/perth/privacy-act-settlement-hijack/): You run a small firm — under ten staff, a handful of active settlement matters at any time, and no in-house IT or security function. One settlement runs at a time, the partner signs off trust transfers, and the same paralegal handles client correspondence end-to-end. ### Estate Lawyer (65 doors)

## Legal by Exegesis

> Agentic AI services for Australian legal practice — citation verification, privilege firewalls, expert evidence attestation, AI-attribution for filings. Anchored in Federal Court GPN-AI and the ART Expert Evidence Direction. Waitlist.

- [Pillar landing](https://exegete.com.au/legal/): overview, service shapes, and how to engage.
- [All LEGAL doors](https://exegete.com.au/legal/services/): the full door directory (223 doors).
- [Waitlist form](https://exegete.com.au/waitlist/legal/): join the waitlist directly.

## Digital Legacy Vault

> Asset-instruction vault for Australian individuals and families. Records what you own, where to find it, and who's nominated to receive the instructions — NOT passwords, NOT crypto keys, NOT the assets themselves. Waitlist.

- [Pillar landing](https://exegete.com.au/dlv/): overview, service shapes, and how to engage.
- [All DLV doors](https://exegete.com.au/dlv/services/): the full door directory (160 doors).
- [Waitlist form](https://exegete.com.au/waitlist/dlv/): join the waitlist directly.

## Cyber by Exegesis

> Fixed-scope cybersecurity engagements for Australian individuals, families, and SMBs. Scam triage, identity recovery, Essential Eight ML1/ML2/ML3 uplift, Notifiable Data Breach response. Waitlist.

- [Pillar landing](https://exegete.com.au/cyber/): overview, service shapes, and how to engage.
- [All CYBER doors](https://exegete.com.au/cyber/services/): the full door directory (148 doors).
- [Waitlist form](https://exegete.com.au/waitlist/cyber/): join the waitlist directly.

### Family (40 doors)
